notes.title: Physics Formula Pack
notes.summary: Core mechanics, electricity, and quick revision formulas packed into one clean sheet.
notes.bodyText:
Mechanics
s = ut + 1/2 at^2
v^2 = u^2 + 2as
F = ma
Work = Force x Displacement

Electricity
V = IR
P = VI
Q = It

Tips
Read the formulas slowly and keep one example question under each section.

notes.title: Chemistry Short Notes
notes.summary: Concise definitions, reactions, and memory-friendly chapter summaries for revision.
notes.bodyText:
Atomic structure, periodicity, bonding, acids and bases, and quick reaction maps.

Use this pack for one-day revision before exams.
